title: payment_watcher: late-confirmed payment activates expired subscription
description: payment_watcher.rs:322 — activate_subscription() parses invoice.expires_at as the new subscription expiry. When a payment is confirmed after the invoice expires (the documented warn-and-activate path, line 256), the subscription row is written with a past expiry. The activate_subscription_atomic CASE preserves the MAX expiry, so if no prior subscription exists, the user gets one that is already expired — they paid and receive nothing. Fix: when the invoice expires_at is in the past, extend from Utc::now() + subscription_days instead of using invoice.expires_at.
